entity_data.publication_caption: Ontem, o Balneário Shopping recebeu o Icônico Pedro Mafra e suas convidadas para um evento especial em celebração à nova coleção Origens da Paula Torres, uma marca de sapatos exclusivos e feitos à mão. O encontro começou com um almoço impecável no restaurante italiano Duladu, seguido de um coquetel na loja, onde as convidadas puderam conhecer de perto cada detalhe da coleção ao lado da própria fundadora, Ana Paula Torres. Para tornar o momento ainda mais memorável, as convidadas foram presenteadas com as pulseiras exclusivas da marca e personalizadas com as suas iniciais A Paula Torres está no piso L1 do Balneário Shopping. Venha descobrir a coleção Origens e viver essa experiência única. ✨💫

Quinta-feira pede um Happy Hour à altura! 🍹🎶 Vem curtir uma noite especial com música ao vivo, double drink nos restaurantes participantes e aquela vibe perfeita para relaxar e aproveitar. ✨ 📍 Onde? Piso L1, pertinho do Unizushi e Duladu. 🕕 Quando? Quinta-feira, a partir das 19h! Chama a galera, marca na agenda e vem brindar com a gente! 🍸🎤  Para mais informações, consulte os restaurantes. @unizushisc é @duladududu

Clima de sabores no ar!  Começou o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping com opções incríveis para todos os gostos e com valor fixo de R$70,00.  Aproveite até 30 de abril nos restaurantes participantes: Unizushi, Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. Venha viver essa experiência deliciosa! *Confira os pratos disponíveis nos restaurantes participantes. *Válido para almoço e jantar.

Uma experiência italiana cheia de sabor e diversão! 🍕✨  No Duladu, a cozinha italiana ganha um toque moderno e descontraído, perfeita para quem ama boa comida e momentos especiais.  Que tal conhecer e se deliciar? 💛 📍 Duladu – Piso L1

A LOBA VEM AÍ! 🗣 Shakira acaba de anunciar que vai trazer a turnê “The Las Mujeres Ya No Lloran World Tour” para o Brasil! 😱 A cantora estará no Rio de Janeiro no dia 11 de fevereiro, e em São Paulo no dia 13 de fevereiro (passa pro lado)! E vale avisar: a pré-venda acontece entre os dias 09  e 10 de outubro, já a venda geral vai rolar a partir do dia 11/10. #shakira #LMYNLWorldTour #radiomix #radiomixfm

ELE CHEGOU! 🇧🇷 Após 6 anos, Niall Horan já está em solo brasileiro. O cantor se apresenta em São Paulo e Rio de Janeiro com a "The Show: Live on Tour". A Mix é Rádio Oficial e você acompanha toda cobertura em nossas redes sociais. (📷 @gi_fflorencio) #niallhoran #liveontour

Já que hoje é dia de #TBT, bora relembrar um pouquinho de tudo o que rolou no Rock in Rio 40 Anos? Já estamos com saudades! 🥹🫶 E aí, qual foi o seu momento favorito da edição de 2024? Conta pra gente aqui nos comentários! Oferecimento: @cocacola_br @engov_oficial @ifoodbrasil @movidaalugueldecarros @superbet_br
O Rock in Rio foi pura nostalgia 🥹❤ Qual desses hits você mais gostava de ouvir na programação da Mix? #tbt #mariahcarey #neyo #akon #evanescence #rockinrio #rockinrio2024 #rockinrio40anos

"Passarinho! Que som é esse?" 🤔 É o som que a Katy Perry ouviu enquanto se apresentava no Rock in Rio! 🤯 Kristopher Pooley, engenheiro de som da Katy Perry, isolou os vocais das 100 mil pessoas que assistiram nossa diva direto da Cidade do Rock! Dá só uma olhada nessa galera cantando o hit "California Gurls"! 😱 Quem tava aí no meio? 👀 📷: Renan Areias / Kristopher Pooley #katyperry #radiomix #radiomixfm #rockinrio #rockinrio2024 #rockinrio40anos
Shawn Mendes entregando TUDO no Palco Mundo do Rock in Rio 🤩 (🎥 @cacograndino) #RockinRio2024 #RockinRioNaMix #Festival #RockinRio40anos #ShawnMendes #ShawnMendesNoRockinRio

entity_data.img_caption:
The image shows a close-up of two hands holding a small, intricately designed object. The object appears to be a piece of jewelry or a decorative item, featuring a combination of leather and metal elements. The leather strap is light brown and has a smooth texture, while the metal parts include gold-colored triangular shapes and a small, rectangular buckle with a gold finish.

The hands are positioned in such a way that they are carefully manipulating the object, possibly adjusting or examining it. The nails of the hands are painted with a bright red polish, adding a pop of color to the scene. The background is blurred, but it seems to be an indoor setting with a patterned surface, possibly a tablecloth or a fabric backdrop. The lighting in the image is warm, casting a soft glow on the hands and the object they are holding.

The image shows a woman standing in front of a mirror, smiling and posing for the camera. She is wearing a strapless white dress that fits closely to her body, accentuating her figure. The dress has a fitted bodice and a flowing skirt. She is accessorized with a layered necklace featuring small, round beads and a delicate pendant. Her hair is long and dark, styled straight. In the background, there are other women, also dressed in elegant attire, suggesting that they might be at a formal event or a fashion show. The setting appears to be indoors, possibly in a boutique or a high-end store, as indicated by the well-lit environment and the presence of shelves with shoes and other accessories.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a person standing in what appears to be a high-end shoe store or boutique. The individual is wearing a stylish outfit consisting of a light blue, long-sleeved shirt with a paisley pattern and matching pants. The shirt has a deep V-neckline and the pants feature a similar paisley design. They are also wearing black sandals.

The background showcases an array of high-end shoes displayed on shelves. The shoes come in various styles and colors, including beige, gold, and white. The shelves are well-lit, highlighting the elegance and sophistication of the footwear. The store has a modern and luxurious interior design, with wooden accents and a clean, minimalist aesthetic. There is also a sign visible in the background, indicating the direction to the exit. The overall atmosphere suggests a sophisticated and fashionable environment.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a group of eight women standing together in what appears to be a well-lit, upscale shopping area or boutique. They are all smiling and posing for the photograph. The women are dressed in stylish, fashionable outfits, ranging from dresses to jumpsuits and skirts. Each woman is holding a maroon-colored shopping bag with the name "PAULA TORRES" printed on it, suggesting they have been shopping at this store.

The setting includes a modern interior with wooden paneling and elegant lighting fixtures hanging from the ceiling. The background features a glass wall with a logo that resembles a stylized letter "P." The overall atmosphere is sophisticated and glamorous, indicative of a high-end retail environment.

The image shows a close-up of a small, rectangular pouch or case made of light beige fabric. The pouch is closed and appears to be made of a soft, possibly cotton or linen material. It has a brown leather strap with a gold-colored metal clasp at the top. The clasp is triangular in shape and features an embossed design that includes a logo or emblem.

The pouch is placed on a wooden surface, which has a natural, light brown color with visible grain patterns. The background is slightly blurred, drawing attention to the pouch itself. The overall appearance suggests that the pouch could be used for carrying small items such as jewelry, accessories, or other personal belongings. The design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on functionality and style.

The image depicts a meal setting on a wooden table. The main focus is a long, thin slice of bread topped with various ingredients. The bread appears to be toasted and has a golden-brown crust. On top of the bread, there are slices of red tomatoes, green basil leaves, and a green sauce that looks like pesto or a similar herb-based spread. The bread is placed on a piece of paper that reads "PARLACOMANDO" in large, bold letters, suggesting it might be a menu or promotional material for a restaurant or food establishment.

To the left of the bread, there is a plate with a salad. The salad consists of mixed greens, possibly including arugula or spinach, and some figs or fig-like fruits. The salad is garnished with what appears to be prosciutto or another type of cured meat.

In the background, there is a small vase with yellow flowers, adding a touch of color and freshness to the scene. The overall presentation suggests a casual yet thoughtful dining experience, combining fresh ingredients and a rustic touch.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a lively scene inside a restaurant or café. The main focus is on a woman with long, blonde hair wearing a white sleeveless top and high-waisted jeans. She has her hand in her pocket and is looking to the side, possibly engaged in conversation or observing something outside the frame.

In the background, there are several other people seated at tables, enjoying their meals and drinks. The tables are set with plates, glasses, and napkins, indicating that they are dining. One person in the background is holding a phone, likely taking a photo or recording a video. Another person is wearing an apron, suggesting they might be a staff member or a chef.

The ambiance of the place is warm and inviting, with soft lighting from overhead fixtures and potted plants adding to the cozy atmosphere. The walls are adorned with decorative elements, and the overall setting suggests a casual yet sophisticated dining environment.

The image depicts a close-up view of a dining table setting, likely in a restaurant or a well-decorated home dining area. The table is adorned with various items that suggest a sophisticated and elegant dining experience.

1. **Glassware**: A hand is holding a tall, clear glass filled with a light-colored beverage, possibly champagne or sparkling wine. The glass is positioned on the left side of the image.

2. **Napkins**: There are neatly folded white napkins placed on the table. One napkin is directly in front of the glass, while another is slightly to the right and behind it.

3. **Beverage Bottle**: To the right of the glass, there is a white bottle with a wooden cap. The label on the bottle reads "PUDU," which could be the brand name or type of beverage.

4. **Silver Bucket**: Next to the bottle, there is a metallic bucket containing additional napkins or perhaps a small serving dish.

5. **Placemat**: The table is covered with a woven placemat, adding a rustic touch to the setting.

6. **Flowers**: On the left side of the image, there is a small vase with red flowers, adding a pop of color and a touch of nature to the scene.

7. **Background**: The background features a red-tiled wall, which provides a vibrant contrast to the otherwise neutral tones of the table setting. There is also a green cushion or chair visible in the background, suggesting a comfortable seating arrangement.

Overall, the image conveys a sense of elegance and attention to detail, with a focus on the careful arrangement of the table setting and the choice of items that enhance the dining experience.

The image shows a group of six women standing together in what appears to be a stylish, modern interior space. The background features wooden paneling and a chandelier with multiple light bulbs, creating a warm and elegant atmosphere.

All the women are smiling and appear to be posing for the photograph. The overall setting suggests a sophisticated event or gathering.
